title: Sentry Release
description: Represents a release in Sentry. Releases track deployments of application versions and link error events to specific code changes, commits, and deployment environments.

id.description: The internal unique identifier of the release.

version.description: The version identifier of the release, unique within the organization.

shortVersion.description: A shortened version string for display purposes.

url.description: A URL pointing to the release (often a CI build URL).

firstEvent.description: Timestamp of the first event for this release.

lastEvent.description: Timestamp of the last event for this release.

newGroups.description: The count of new issues introduced by this release.

authors.description: Authors of commits in this release.

commitCount.description: The number of commits associated with this release.

lastDeploy.description: The most recent deployment of this release.
